nodes.label: ParserState
nodes.snippet:
interface ParserState {
  readonly tools: ToolStream.State<string>
  readonly hasFunctionCall: boolean
  readonly lifecycle: Lifecycle.State
  readonly reasoningItems: Readonly<Record<string, ReasoningStreamItem>>
  readonly store: boolean | undefined
}

nodes.label: ReasoningStreamItem
lowerTool()
lowerToolChoice()
nodes.snippet:
lowerToolChoice = (toolChoice: NonNullable<LLMRequest["toolChoice"]>) =>
  ProviderShared.matchToolChoice("OpenAI Responses", toolChoice, {
    auto: () => "auto" as const,
    none: () => "none" as const,
    required: () => "required" as const,
    tool: (name) => ({ type: "function" as const, name }),
  })

nodes.label: lowerToolCall()
lowerReasoning()
hostedToolItemID()
mapUsage()
mapFinishReason()
nodes.snippet:
mapFinishReason = (event: OpenAIResponsesEvent, hasFunctionCall: boolean): FinishReason => {
  const reason = event.response?.incomplete_details?.reason
  if (reason === undefined || reason === null) return hasFunctionCall ? "tool-calls" : "stop"
  if (reason === "max_output_tokens") return "length"
  if (reason === "content_filter") return "content-filter"
  return hasFunctionCall ? "tool-calls" : "unknown"
}

nodes.label: openaiMetadata()
nodes.snippet: openaiMetadata = (metadata: Record<string, unknown>): ProviderMetadata => ({ openai: metadata })

nodes.label: isHostedToolItem()
nodes.snippet:
isHostedToolItem = (
  item: OpenAIResponsesStreamItem,
): item is OpenAIResponsesStreamItem & { type: HostedToolType; id: string } =>
  item.type in HOSTED_TOOLS && typeof item.id === "string" && item.id.length > 0

nodes.label: isReasoningItem()
nodes.snippet:
isReasoningItem = (
  item: OpenAIResponsesStreamItem,
): item is OpenAIResponsesStreamItem & { type: "reasoning"; id: string } =>
  item.type === "reasoning" && typeof item.id === "string" && item.id.length > 0

nodes.label: hostedToolResult()
hostedToolEvents()
onOutputTextDelta()
onReasoningDelta()
onReasoningDone()
nodes.snippet: onReasoningDone = (state: ParserState, _event: OpenAIResponsesEvent): StepResult => [state, NO_EVENTS]

nodes.label: reasoningMetadata()
nodes.snippet:
reasoningMetadata = (item: OpenAIResponsesStreamItem & { id: string }) =>
  openaiMetadata({ itemId: item.id, reasoningEncryptedContent: item.encrypted_content ?? null })

nodes.label: onOutputItemAdded()
onReasoningSummaryPartAdded()
onReasoningSummaryPartDone()
nodes.snippet:
onReasoningSummaryPartDone = (state: ParserState, event: OpenAIResponsesEvent): StepResult => {
  if (!event.item_id || event.summary_index === undefined) return [state, NO_EVENTS]
  const item = state.reasoningItems[event.item_id]
  if (!item) return [state, NO_EVENTS]
  const events: LLMEvent[] = []
  return [
    {
      ...state,
      lifecycle:
        state.store !== false
          ? Lifecycle.reasoningEnd(
              state.lifecycle,
              events,
              `${event.item_id}:${event.summary_index}`,
              openaiMetadata({ itemId: event.item_id }),
            )
          : state.lifecycle,
      reasoningItems: {
        ...state.reasoningItems,
        [event.item_id]: {
          ...item,
          summaryParts: {
            ...item.summaryParts,
            [event.summary_index]: state.store !== false ? "concluded" : "can-conclude",
          },

nodes.label: onResponseFinish()
providerErrorMessage()
nodes.snippet:
providerErrorMessage = (event: OpenAIResponsesEvent, fallback: string): string => {
  const nested = event.response?.error ?? undefined
  const message = event.message || nested?.message || undefined
  const code = event.code || nested?.code || undefined
  if (message && code) return `${code}: ${message}`
  return message || code || fallback
}

nodes.label: providerError()
onResponseFailed()
nodes.snippet:
onResponseFailed = (state: ParserState, event: OpenAIResponsesEvent): StepResult => [
  state,
  [providerError(event, "OpenAI Responses response failed")],
]

nodes.label: onError()
nodes.snippet:
onError = (state: ParserState, event: OpenAIResponsesEvent): StepResult => [
  state,
  [providerError(event, "OpenAI Responses stream error")],
]

webSocketMessage()
